brand_identity.name: Cape Jervis Wine
brand_identity.essence: Premium, Modern Luxury, Editorial, Calm, Confident

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and wine names. Use italic style for emphasis words.

textures.grain: url('data:image/svg+xml,...') (Add a subtle noise texture overlay to the whole body)
textures.limestone: Use the limestone image as a subtle parallax background in the 'Terroir' section

layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A) for storytelling, Asymmetric 12-col grid for layouts.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-[#F9F9F7] px-8 py-4 text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] hover:bg-[#4B7F78] transition-colors duration-500 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] px-8 py-4 text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-[#F9F9F7] transition-colors duration-500 rounded-none
buttons.link: text-[#1A1A1A] underline decoration-1 underline-offset-8 hover:text-[#4B7F78] transition-colors

cards.style: bg-transparent border border-[#1A1A1A]/10 p-8 hover:border-[#1A1A1A]/30 transition-colors duration-500 group

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#1A1A1A]/20 px-0 py-4 focus:border-[#4B7F78] focus:ring-0 rounded-none placeholder:text-[#1A1A1A]/40

animations.parallax: Use useScroll and useTransform for image containers to move slower than scroll speed.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on dark backgrounds is #F9F9F7 or #E6E2DD. Do not use grey text on dark backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. SETUP FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to `index.css` immediately.
3. AGE GATE: Implement the Age Verification Modal using Shadcn Dialog. It must appear on first load. Store state in localStorage.
4. HERO SECTION: Full-screen height. Use the Lighthouse image. Overlay text: 'Edge of the Continent'. Minimalist nav.
5. SECTIONS: Alternate backgrounds. Hero (Light) -> About (Dark) -> Wines (Light) -> Terroir (Dark/Texture) -> Contact (Light).
6. WINE SHOWCASE: Do not use a standard grid. Use a horizontal scroll or a staggered list layout. Each wine needs a 'Tasting Note' and 'Pairing' section.
7. FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components but style them to match the 'inputs.style' guide (Underlined, no background).
8. FOOTER: Massive padding (py-32). Large 'Cape Jervis' typography. Legal disclaimer is mandatory.
9. NOVELTY: Avoid 'bouncy' animations. Everything must feel slow, heavy, and smooth (luxury feel).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx`
